description: Collibra is a leading enterprise data governance platform helping organizations understand, trust, and access their data 🏢
The company is recognized as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Governance Solutions
Working as a Software Engineer in the AI/ML team, focusing on intelligent data classification 🚀
Developing machine learning services to automate metadata extraction and enhance data cataloging
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver data intelligence solutions
• Worked together with quality assurance engineers to ensure proper testing procedures on technical and functional level
• Deployments: Helm charts, Kubernetis, ArgoCD (Multi-tenant), Jenkins (Single-tenant)
• Persistence: Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, JDBC
• CI/CD, Monitoring, Logs aggregation: GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus, Datadog
• IDE: IntelliJ, Visual Studio Code, Cursor
